shipped.description: Git-native prompt regression testing with judge calibration for LLM CI/CD pipelines
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: Judge calibration — verifies LLM judge agrees with humans before trusting it as a CI gate.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/prompt-lock, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to + r/LocalLLaMA

shipped.description: Behavioral contract enforcement for LLM function calls — @contract decorator + versioned behavioral specs + drift detection
shipped.key_differentiator: The only pip-installable library that defines, versions, and enforces behavioral (not just structural) contracts on LLM function calls, with SQLite drift logging and CI gate.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-035 (Acts 2:1-13 — Pentecost: many languages, one coherent message contract)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — confirmed no direct competitor across 4 live searches (March 2026).
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/llm-contract, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

shipped.description: Git-native PR semantic intent verifier — checks whether a PR's code changes actually fulfill the stated intent in the description. Catches silent contract violations before they hit production.
shipped.key_differentiator: The only open-source tool that verifies whether a PR's code changes fulfill its stated intent — pre-merge, with a CI gate, for any git repo.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-036 (Romans 7:7 — The Law makes violations visible)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — 5 live searches March 2026 confirmed no direct competitor.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/drift-guard, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

shipped.description: Semantic specification drift detector for LLM outputs — monitors continuous semantic compliance with declared behavioral specifications, even when structural validation (Pydantic) passes.
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: The first open-source tool that continuously monitors whether LLM outputs remain semantically compliant with a declared behavioral specification — not just structural validation (Pydantic) and not just batch evaluation (DeepEval).
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-037 (Leviticus 10:1-3 — The Authorized Fire: structural compliance ≠ semantic compliance)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — BibleWorld Cycle 012 confirmed. No open-source competitor. Evidently/NannyML detect statistical data drift (different domain). DeepEval is batch eval (not continuous). Pydantic is structural (misses semantic drift).
shipped.model_used: No model dependency — pure Python + Pydantic v2. Works with any LLM provider.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/spec-drift, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

revenue_status.note: Four tools MIT OSS — code-complete, PyPI-ready. Revenue path: enterprise support + hosted dashboard (v0.3+). Traction gate: 100 GitHub stars + 100 PyPI installs per tool.
revenue_status.law_2_trigger: If all four tools under 100 installs after 3 weeks of launch, pivot to GrantPilot. BUT: Grant Wizard launched March 2026 as Africa's first AI grant writing platform — GrantPilot competitive moat narrowed. Re-evaluate at traction gate.
revenue_status.blocker: PyPI account + GitHub repos needed — manual step outside build loop.

currently_building.status: ALL FOUR TOOLS CODE-COMPLETE — waiting for PyPI/GitHub deploy
currently_building.next_build: cot-coherence v0.1.0 (BibleWorld BUILD FIFTH, score 8.00) OR pivot to revenue product

cycle_4_summary.competitive_verdict: GREEN — semantic LLM spec compliance monitoring unoccupied. No pip-installable competitor confirmed in 4 fresh searches March 2026. spec-drift name available on PyPI.
cycle_4_summary.grantpilot_verdict: PAUSED — Grant Wizard launched March 12 2026 as Africa's first AI grant writing platform (Nigeria-based, 1,100+ alumni, $30M secured). Direct competitor. Will not build GrantPilot without further competitive analysis.

competitive_intelligence.spec_semantic_drift_monitoring: GREEN — No direct competitor. Evidently/NannyML = statistical feature drift (different domain). DeepEval = batch eval not continuous monitoring. Pydantic = structural only.
competitive_intelligence.pr_semantic_intent_verification: GREEN — drift-guard confirmed. Salesforce building internal tool (6-12 month window).
competitive_intelligence.prompt_regression_testing: RED — Promptfoo (OpenAI), DeepEval, LLMQ, Latitude all confirmed.
competitive_intelligence.cot_coherence_detection: GREEN — No pip-installable competitor. 3 academic papers Feb-Mar 2026 confirm the gap (Reasoning Horizon at 70-85% chain length). 3-6 month window.
competitive_intelligence.grant_writing_ai_africa: RED — Grant Wizard (Nigeria, March 2026) is direct competitor to GrantPilot. Multiple global competitors: FundRobin, Instrumentl, Granted AI, Grantable. GrantPilot competitive moat requires differentiation analysis.
competitive_intelligence.reasoning_horizon_paper: Feb 2026 arXiv: 'Limited Reasoning Space' — confirms CoT degradation beyond critical chain length. No tool built. cot-coherence window intact.

llm_contract.judge_abstraction: Direct Anthropic + OpenAI SDKs (avoided LiteLLM due to supply chain attack March 2026)
llm_contract.storage: SQLite — zero dependencies, self-hosted, user owns data

drift_guard.llm_abstraction: Direct Anthropic SDK (avoided LiteLLM due to supply chain attack March 2026)

spec_drift.llm_abstraction: NONE — pure Python + Pydantic v2. Zero LLM API dependency for core functionality.
spec_drift.storage: SQLite — zero dependencies, self-hosted, in-memory option for testing
spec_drift.dependencies: pydantic>=2.0 only (runtime). click/rich NOT added — argparse used to keep deps minimal.
spec_drift.connection_management: Persistent in-memory connection for :memory: databases; fresh connection per operation for file DBs

shared.ci_publishing: OIDC trusted publishing via pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish — no stored API tokens

spec_drift.priority_1: GitHub repo + README — primary organic discovery
spec_drift.priority_2: Dev.to: 'Your LLM outputs pass Pydantic. That’s not enough.'
spec_drift.priority_3: r/MachineLearning + r/LocalLLaMA — 'Silent model updates are shifting your LLM output distributions'
spec_drift.pydantic_angle: Pydantic is the universal LLM output validator. spec-drift is the next layer — semantic compliance on top of structural validation.
spec_drift.evidently_angle: Evidently monitors statistical data drift. spec-drift monitors semantic spec compliance. Different problem, different layer.
spec_drift.priority_4: Show HN — 'I built a tool that detects when your LLM outputs drift from their declared behavioral spec'

pipeline.next_developer_tool: cot-coherence (BibleWorld BUILD FIFTH, score 8.00) — confirmed GREEN in 2 fresh searches March 2026. 3-6 month competitive window.
pipeline.next_revenue_product: GrantPilot re-evaluation required — Grant Wizard (direct competitor) launched March 2026. Need fresh competitive analysis before building.
pipeline.decision_gate: After 100+ installs on any tool: continue developer tools track with cot-coherence. Under 100 in 3 weeks of launch: evaluate GrantPilot competitive moat vs Grant Wizard.
